description: Inference API on a running GPU worker (DD-157). Distinct from virtualisation-v1 (deployment) and serverless-v1 (cloud GPU endpoints). First implementer: stallari-gpu-worker.

operations.description: Hardware info, VRAM, utilisation, temperature, driver
operations.name: gpu_status

operations.description: Prompt + conversation → completion (destructive in cost terms, requires confirmation)
operations.name: run_inference

operations.description: Pending, active, completed counts, average wait
operations.name: queue_status

title: gpu-inference-v1
